title: Capstone Integrated Case Simulation
description: The Capstone is where everything comes together. Through complex multi-layered pharmacy simulation cases set in Caribbean environments — Port of Spain, Kingston, Grenada — you demonstrate the full range of diploma competencies.
what_youll_learn: Integrate clinical, regulatory, and communication competencies to manage complex real-world scenarios
Demonstrate professional judgement under time pressure and competing priorities
Apply the full dispensing workflow including clinical flag escalation, documentation, and patient counselling
Show leadership capability in managing team, system, and patient safety challenges
Produce a reflective portfolio evidencing competency across all diploma learning outcomes
